title: Foils Marvel Stuff
body:
![Apex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13e5078b65cbb2b267f08761077d0d990213d1b2.png)
[https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y](https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y)

This mod is meant to be used with Palladium and adds in a few things like Blocks, Items, and Entities. Primarily Ghost Riders Motorcycle. More Features will be added as needed.

By its self the Mod is useless since you can not get the Motorcycle or Car in Survival and I do not plan on them being able to be gotten. The mod will might only end up being Forge Based depending on the Engjoyment I may make it Fabric as well. If there are features you would like to see added to the Mod such as a Block or Item feel free to DM me on Discord: foi1y

The Ghost Riders Motorcycle has 1 Seat, a Speed of 0.4 Which is just slightly faster than a Horse. 

Engine of Vengeance (Robbie Reyes Car) is based off a 1969 Dodge Charger R/T It has 2 Seats and a Speed of 0.5 It will mostlikly be the fastest Vehicle in the mod.

I have plans to add in More stuff later on depending on what people would like to see added.

If you would like to use this in an addon pack Credit would be Great to have!
